calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-17-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Christine Witherspoon.

Ms. Rasch stated that she called the Life Insurance Company and was told that the claim was paid out on October 24, 2012, and that they would not provide any other information. Ms. Rasch also stated that she tried calling Ms. Witherspoon, that she contacted the Attorney representing the Beneficiaries, but has not heard back and that there was no bond. The Court granted the Motion for Withdrawal of Attorney of Record (subject to review of the order) and subject to Ms. Rasch making a final effort to contact the Beneficiaries and the Beneficiaries Counsel to inform them of status of the Estate proceedings.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-02-2017 Continued To May-16-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
